sugarspilled:

☆ to be woken up with a nipple being put in my mouth. being told “shh, baby, it’s okay. it’s just me.” and her hand playing with my hair. sucking on her tit until she’s satisfied and moves me to the other one. i drift back to sleep while she coos at me saying “that’s it, angel. just what i needed.”
